findings.description: The '正常起動' (launch) processing flow is absent. The source defines this flow with a key annotation on ProcessResidentHandler: '以降、常駐処理を開始する。監視間隔ごとに後続のハンドラキューの処理が繰り返し実行される。' — i.e., subsequent handler queue processing repeats at each monitoring interval. This interval-repeat behavior is not explicitly captured in s3.
findings.source_evidence: launch: [ ["Main", "inbound"], ["ThreadContextHandler_main", "inbound"], ["ProcessResidentHandler", "inbound", "以降、常駐処理を開始する。監視間隔ごとに後続のハンドラキューの処理が繰り返し実行される。"] ]

findings.description: Several PascalCase handler class names explicitly listed in the s3 handler queue table and/or flow descriptions are absent from s3 hints: StatusCodeConvertHandler, GlobalErrorHandler, ThreadContextHandler_main, RetryHandler, RequestPathJavaPackageMapping, BatchAction.
findings.source_evidence: HandlerQueue includes: "StatusCodeConvertHandler", "GlobalErrorHandler", "ThreadContextHandler_main", "RetryHandler", "RequestPathJavaPackageMapping". BatchAction appears repeatedly in flow descriptions (callback events, error handling).
